name: com.unai.universal-ai-connector
description: Universal AI connector for Unity. Unified C# API for OpenAI GPT-5, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, Mistral, Cohere, Ollama, LM Studio, llama.cpp, xAI Grok, DeepSeek, and any OpenAI-compatible LLM. Real-time streaming, async/await, cross-platform (Windows, Mac, Linux, Android, iOS, WebGL). Build AI-powered NPCs, chatbots, and tools.
